7671261102286.title: Guerniss Raw Ginger Hair Oil 100 ML
7671261102286.body_html:
Ginger Hair Oil is a nourishing herbal oil blend designed to strengthen hair roots, improve scalp health, and promote healthier, shinier hair. Powered by Ginger extract, this formula helps stimulate the scalp and support natural hair growth while reducing dryness and breakage.

Enriched with natural oils such as Sesame Oil, Prunus Dulcis (Sweet Almond) Oil, Coconut Oil, Olea Europaea (Olive Oil), and Simmondsia Chinensis (Jojoba Oil), this hair oil deeply moisturizes the scalp and hair strands, leaving hair soft, smooth, and manageable.

Botanical ingredients like Chamomile, Rosmarinus Officinalis (Rosemary), and Crocus Sativus (Saffron) help soothe the scalp and add natural shine. The lightweight formula absorbs easily into the scalp, making it suitable for regular hair care routines.

How to Use:

Apply a small amount of oil to the scalp and hair. Gently massage in circular motions and leave for at least 30 minutes or overnight. Wash with shampoo for best results.

7671260577998.body_html:

Botanical extracts like Chamomile, Rosmarinus Officinalis (Rosemary), and Crocus Sativus (Saffron) help soothe the scalp while promoting healthy, vibrant hair.

The lightweight oil absorbs easily into the scalp and hair, making it ideal for regular use to maintain strong, smooth, and shiny hair.

How to Use:

Apply a small amount of oil to the scalp and hair. Massage gently in circular motions. Leave for at least 30 minutes or overnight before washing with shampoo.

For shoppers comparing options, it offers the care of a keratin care in one simple step.

Massage gently to create lather, then rinse thoroughly.

7666690752718.title: Guerniss 5% Niacinamide Cream 5X Ceramide
7666690752718.body_html:

Formulated with 5% Niacinamide (Vitamin B3) and a 5X Ceramide Complex, it helps improve skin texture while locking in essential moisture.

Enriched with Centella Asiatica Extract, the cream soothes sensitive or stressed skin, while Sodium Hyaluronate delivers deep hydration for a plump, smooth finish. Antioxidant botanical extracts such as Dendrobium Officinale Stem Extract and Bacillus/Soybean Ferment help protect the skin from environmental damage and maintain a healthy glow.

The fast-absorbing, non-greasy formula makes it suitable for daily use and all skin types, including oily and combination skin.

How to Use

Apply an appropriate amount to clean face and neck after toner and serum. Gently massage until fully absorbed. Use morning and night.

7666117640398.title: Guerniss 5% Niacinamide Toner 100ml
7666117640398.body_html:

Formulated with 5% Niacinamide (Vitamin B3), it helps minimize the appearance of pores, reduce dark spots, and improve overall skin tone and texture.

Infused with 5X Ceramides (Ceramide NP) and Centella Asiatica Extract, this toner supports the skin barrier, soothes irritation, and protects against environmental stressors. Vitamin B5 (Panthenol), Betaine, and Sodium Hyaluronate deliver deep hydration, leaving the skin plump, smooth, and refreshed.

Enriched with antioxidant-rich botanical extracts like Dendrobium Officinale Stem Extract and Fermented Soybean Extract, this toner helps promote healthy, radiant-looking skin without feeling sticky or heavy. Suitable for daily use and all skin types.

How to Use

After cleansing, apply an appropriate amount to a cotton pad or palms. Gently pat onto face and neck until fully absorbed. Use morning and night.

7665259217102.body_html:

The silky, non-sticky formula glides effortlessly onto the lips, while the precision applicator perfectly outlines lip contours for a polished, radiant finish. Enriched with Vitamin E, glycerin, and moisturizing emollients, this gloss helps keep lips soft, hydrated, and comfortable throughout the day.

Perfect for everyday wear or layering over lipstick, this mirror lip gloss enhances your natural lip color with a luminous shine that feels as good as it looks.

How to Use

Apply an appropriate amount to the lips using a lip brush or applicator. Blend evenly from the center outward for a smooth, glossy finish.

Note

7665256661198.title: Guerniss Raw Rosemerry Face & body oil
7665256661198.body_html:
Guerniss Raw Rosemary Face, Body Oil is a luxurious, multi-purpose oil crafted to nourish, strengthen, and rejuvenate your skin, hair, and body. Powered by pure rosemary extract and a blend of botanical oils, this all-in-one formula supports healthy skin, promotes stronger hair, and delivers deep hydration from head to toe.

Infused with Sesame Oil, Prunus Dulcis (Sweet Almond) Oil, Simmondsia Chinensis (Jojoba) Oil, and Olea Europaea (Olive) Oil, it helps lock in moisture, improve texture, and restore natural radiance. Chamomilla (Chamomile) soothes sensitive skin, while Rosmarinus Officinalis (Rosemary) and Crocus Sativus (Saffron) help energize dull skin and support scalp health.

Lightweight yet deeply nourishing, this oil absorbs easily without leaving a greasy residue, making it ideal for daily use on face, hair, and body.

How to Use:

  • For body: Apply to damp skin after showering for long-lasting moisture.

7665254826190.title: Guerniss Raw Vitamin E Body Oil 100ml
7665254826190.body_html:
Guerniss Raw Vitamin E Body Oil is a rich yet lightweight body oil designed to deeply nourish, soften, and restore dry or dull skin. Formulated with Vitamin E Oil and a blend of natural plant oils, this body oil helps lock in moisture, improve skin texture, and promote a healthy, radiant glow.

Infused with Prunus Dulcis (Sweet Almond) Oil, Simmondsia Chinensis (Jojoba) Oil, and Olea Europaea (Olive) Oil, it delivers long-lasting hydration while supporting the skin’s natural barrier. The fast-absorbing formula leaves skin smooth and non-greasy, making it perfect for daily use.

Ideal for use after showering or before bedtime, this body oil keeps skin supple, nourished, and visibly healthier with regular use.

7665254170830.title: Guerniss Raw Juliet Rose Water 100ml
7665254170830.body_html:

This gentle formula helps hydrate, calm, and balance the skin while leaving it feeling fresh and revitalized.

Spray directly onto clean face or apply with a cotton pad. Use morning and night, or anytime your skin needs a refreshing boost.

7662289780942.title: Guerniss Raw Salicylic Acid 0.5% Toner
7662289780942.body_html:
Guerniss Raw Salicylic Acid 0.5% Toner is a gentle exfoliating toner designed to refine pores, remove excess oil, and promote smoother, clearer skin. Formulated with 0.5% Salicylic Acid (BHA), it helps unclog pores, reduce breakouts, and control shine without causing dryness or irritation.

The toner is enriched with Panthenol for soothing and hydration, Trehalose for antioxidant protection, and Glycerin & Butylene Glycol for maintaining skin moisture. Additional hydrating and stabilizing agents like Xylitylglucoside, Anhydroxylitol, and Carrageenan ensure the skin stays balanced, soft, and comfortable after each use.

Lightweight and non-sticky, this toner is perfect for daily use and prepares the skin for the next step in your skincare routine.

How to Use:
Apply a small amount to a cotton pad and sweep gently across the face after cleansing. Avoid direct contact with eyes. Use once or twice daily depending on skin tolerance.

✨ Suitable For:
Oily, combination, and acne-prone skin. Patch test recommended for sensitive skin.

7662289518798.title: Guerniss Raw Niacinamide 5% Toner
7662289518798.body_html:

Powered by 5% Niacinamide (Vitamin B3), it helps reduce the appearance of dark spots, uneven skin tone, and redness while strengthening the skin barrier.

This gentle formula is enhanced with Arbutin to support brightening, Sodium Hyaluronate for deep hydration, and Glycerin & Butylene Glycol to lock in moisture. Mild cleansing agents such as Cocamidopropyl Betaine help remove residual impurities after cleansing without stripping the skin.

Suitable for daily use, this toner refreshes the skin, leaving it smooth, balanced, and ready for the next steps in your skincare routine.

How to Use:
Apply a small amount to a cotton pad and gently sweep over the face and neck after cleansing. Can also be patted into skin with hands. Use morning and night.

✨ Suitable For:
All skin types, especially oily, combination, and dull skin. (Patch test recommended for sensitive skin.)

The advanced formula includes Niacinamide to support an even skin tone and strengthen the skin barrier, while Hyaluronic Acid provides long-lasting hydration. Mild cleansing agents such as Cocamidopropyl Betaine work with fatty acids (Lauric, Myristic, and Stearic Acid) to create a rich lather that effectively removes dirt, oil, and makeup without stripping the skin.

Infused with Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Extract, this cleanser soothes and refreshes the skin, leaving it clean, smooth, and healthy-looking. Suitable for daily use, it is ideal for those seeking a nourishing cleanser that supports both cleansing and skincare in one step.

7662288634062.title: Guerniss Raw Niacinamide Micellar Water

Enriched with Niacinamide (Vitamin B3), this micellar water helps brighten the complexion, minimize the appearance of pores, and support a healthy skin barrier.

The formula features mild cleansing agents such as Decyl Glucoside and PEG-40 Glyceryl Cocoate, which attract and lift away impurities without stripping the skin. Xylitylglucoside and Xylitol help maintain moisture balance, leaving the skin feeling fresh, soft, and comfortable after every use.

Lightweight and non-sticky, this no-rinse cleanser is ideal for daily use and suitable for most skin types, especially oily and combination skin.

✨ Suitable For:

7662287651022.title: Guerniss Raw Glycolic Acid Micellar Water
7662287651022.body_html:

Powered by Glycolic Acid (AHA), this micellar water helps improve skin texture, refine pores, and promote a clear, radiant complexion without harsh rubbing.

The formula is balanced with Decyl Glucoside and PEG-40 Glyceryl Cocoate, mild cleansing agents that lift away dirt and makeup while remaining gentle on the skin. Hexylene Glycol enhances hydration and formula stability, while Xylitylglucoside and Xylitol help maintain skin moisture and prevent dryness during cleansing.

Designed for daily use, this lightweight, no-rinse cleanser refreshes the skin without leaving a sticky or tight feeling—making it suitable for normal, oily, and combination skin types.

7662280573134.title: Guerniss Raw Hair Serum
7662280573134.body_html:

Powered by advanced silicone technology and enriched with Vitamin E, this lightweight formula coats each strand evenly, reducing frizz while enhancing natural shine without weighing hair down.

The blend of Cyclopentasiloxane, Dimethiconol, Dimethicone Crosspolymer, and Phenyl Trimethicone creates a protective layer over the hair shaft, helping to seal moisture, prevent breakage, and protect hair from environmental stressors such as heat styling and pollution. Vitamin E works as an antioxidant to nourish hair, improve manageability, and promote healthier-looking locks.

Perfect for all hair types, Guerniss Raw Hair Serum absorbs quickly and leaves no greasy residue—making it ideal for daily use on both damp and dry hair.

Suitable For:
All hair types, including dry, damaged, and chemically treated hair.

7661092765902.title: Guerniss Raw Hydro Boost Cleanser With Hyaluronic Acid 100ml

All skin types, especially dry, dehydrated, and sensitive skin.

7661067632846.title: Guerniss Raw Floral Shower Gel 250ml
7661067632846.body_html:
Experience the Refreshing Power of Guerniss Raw Floral Shower Gel

Guerniss Raw Floral Shower Gel is a gentle yet effective daily body cleanser designed to refresh, hydrate, and brighten your skin. This luxurious gel produces a rich, foamy lather that cleanses deeply without stripping your skin's natural moisture balance. With every use, it leaves your skin feeling soft, smooth, and delicately scented. If you seek the best floral body wash, this product offers an unmatched shower experience that nourishes and revitalizes your skin.

Key Ingredients That Set This Floral Shower Gel Apart

Infused with powerful ingredients like Glutathione and Niacinamide, this floral body wash helps improve skin tone and reduce dullness. These components work synergistically to promote a healthy, radiant glow, making it an essential part of your daily skincare routine. The shower gel also contains Glycerin, a humectant known for its deep hydration properties that ensure your skin feels moisturized long after your shower.

Botanical extracts such as Rose Chinensis, Lavender, and Rosemary further enhance this formula. These floral extracts soothe and calm the skin, easing any irritation while invigorating your senses. The floral notes create a refreshing shower experience that closely resembles a flower body wash designed with your skin’s health in mind.

Benefits of Using This Floral Shower Gel Daily

  • Gentle cleansing: It removes dirt and impurities while preserving your skin's moisture.
  • Brightening effect: Promotes even skin tone and reduces dullness.
  • Hydration: Glycerin and botanical extracts provide long-lasting moisture.
  • Soothing properties: Floral extracts calm and refresh your skin.
  • Suitable for all skin types: Perfect for daily use regardless of skin sensitivity.

This shower gel is the ultimate floral body wash for those wanting to combine skincare benefits with a delightful aroma. It’s not just a gel; it’s a multi-beneficial formula that supports healthy skin while energizing your shower routine.

Why Choose Guerniss Raw Floral Shower Gel for Your Shower Routine

The floral scent offers a unique blend that captivates the senses without overwhelming them. Daily use helps you maintain clean, nourished, and refreshed skin. This floral shower gel is suitable for all skin types, emphasizing gentle care without sacrificing effectiveness. Its formulation balances cleansing with hydration, unlike harsh soaps that can dry your skin.

Many floral body washes fail to combine hydration with brightening effects, but this gel does both. By incorporating ingredients such as glutathione, niacinamide, and floral extracts, it stands out among other shower gels. Using it regularly ensures your skin feels and looks its best.

Floral Body Wash Ingredients That Make a Difference

  • Glutathione: An antioxidant that brightens the skin and improves tone.
  • Niacinamide: Reduces dullness and promotes an even complexion.
  • Glycerin: Provides deep and lasting hydration.
  • Rose Chinensis Extract: Soothes and nourishes vulnerable skin.
  • Lavender Extract: Calms and refreshes with a natural floral aroma.
  • Rosemary Extract: Revitalizes and energizes skin during your shower.

The purity of these ingredients and their combined effects are the reasons this gel remains one of the best floral body wash options on the market today. The natural botanical infusion makes each shower feel like a spa treatment, leaving behind a soft, radiant glow.

Enhance Your Skin Health with This Floral Shower Gel

Alongside a nourishing formula, this gel maintains your skin's natural moisture during cleansing. It helps prevent dryness and irritation often caused by traditional body washes. By offering hydration through glycerin and calming botanical extracts, it supports skin barrier protection and cellular renewal.

If you love shower products with floral notes, this gel is the perfect choice. It blends floral elegance with high-performance skincare benefits, ideal for anyone wanting a floral body wash that truly cares for the skin.

Incorporate a Rose-Inspired Cleanse into Your Shower Routine

Rose Chinensis, an essential component of this gel, acts as a natural botanical infusion. This ingredient provides gentle cleansing while adding extra softness. The combination of rose, lavender, and rosemary extracts helps transform your shower into a calming floral escape.

Whether you seek a refreshing floral gel or a hydrating aloe vera gel alternative, Guerniss Raw Floral Shower Gel is a comprehensive solution. It cleanses without drying and leaves a floral scent that stays long after your shower ends.

Perfect for All Skin Types and Concerns

From dry to sensitive skin, this floral shower gel was designed with universal compatibility in mind. You can use it every day without worry, as it blends powerful actives with mild cleansers. The formula balances brightening, hydration, and soothing effects for an all-round care experience.

With Guerniss Raw Floral Shower Gel, you receive a premium body wash flower blend that nourishes and delights your skin daily. It’s an ideal product for people who desire freshness, moisture, and a subtle floral fragrance in their shower routine.

7661061996750.title: Guerniss Raw Bloom Shower Gel 250ml
7661061996750.body_html:
Full Product Description

Guerniss Raw Bloom Shower Gel is a luxurious daily body cleanser that gently removes impurities while providing hydration and nourishment for smooth, healthy-looking skin. Its rich foam creates a soothing bathing experience, leaving your skin refreshed, soft, and lightly fragranced.

Infused with Glutathione, this shower gel helps brighten dull skin, while Vitamin E nourishes and protects against environmental stressors. Glycerin and Cocamidopropyl Betaine ensure deep hydration and gentle cleansing without drying the skin. Botanical extracts like Rose Chinensis, Lavender, and Rosemary soothe, calm, and refresh the skin, giving you a revitalizing shower experience.

With a lightweight, non-drying formula, Guerniss Raw Bloom Shower Gel is ideal for all skin types and perfect for daily use, leaving skin feeling clean, nourished, and radiant.

7661058883790.title: Guerniss Raw Cloud Touch Shower Gel 250ml
7661058883790.body_html:
Full Product Description

Guerniss Raw Cloud Touch Shower Gel is a luxurious daily body cleanser designed to gently wash away dirt and impurities while keeping your skin soft, hydrated, and refreshed. Its rich, foamy lather delivers a soothing shower experience, leaving your skin feeling clean without dryness or tightness.

Powered by Glutathione, this shower gel helps brighten and revive dull-looking skin, while Hyaluronic Acid and Glycerin deeply hydrate and lock in moisture. Botanical extracts like Rose Chinensis, Rosemary, and Cocoa nourish and soothe the skin, providing antioxidant protection and a naturally refreshing feel.

With a lightweight, non-drying formula and a pleasant fragrance, Guerniss Raw Cloud Touch Shower Gel is perfect for everyday use, suitable for all skin types, and ideal for maintaining smooth, healthy-looking skin from head to toe.

7661058490574.title: Guerniss Raw Glycolic Acid 2% Serum 30ml
7661058490574.body_html:
Full Product Description

Guerniss Raw Glycolic Acid Serum is a gentle yet effective exfoliating treatment designed to improve skin texture, brighten dull complexion, and promote a smoother, more radiant appearance. This lightweight formula works on the skin’s surface to remove dead skin cells and encourage cell turnover for fresher, healthier-looking skin.

Formulated with Glycolic Acid, a powerful AHA exfoliant, this serum helps fade dark spots, refine pores, and enhance skin clarity over time. Niacinamide supports skin barrier health and evens out skin tone, while Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Extract and Panthenol soothe and calm the skin, reducing irritation and dryness. Glycerin and Propylene Glycol deliver essential hydration to keep skin soft and balanced.

With a non-sticky, fast-absorbing texture, this serum layers easily under moisturizer and sunscreen, making it suitable for nighttime use as part of your skincare routine.

7661058130126.title: Guerniss Raw Glutathione Vitamin C Body and Face Scrub 200ml
7661058130126.body_html:
Guerniss Raw Glutathione Vitamin C Body Scrub (200ml) is a gentle exfoliating body scrub designed to remove dead skin cells, brighten dull skin, and improve overall skin texture. This refreshing formula cleanses effectively while maintaining the skin’s natural moisture balance.

Formulated with Peach Fruit Extract, the scrub provides mild physical exfoliation to smooth rough areas and reveal softer skin. Vitamin C and Glutathione work together to enhance skin brightness, improve uneven tone, and protect the skin from environmental stress. Niacinamide supports skin clarity and helps strengthen the skin barrier.

Soothing ingredients like Aloe Vera, Panthenol, and Chamomile Extract help calm and hydrate the skin during exfoliation. Green Tea and Licorice Root Extract offer antioxidant and brightening benefits, leaving the skin refreshed and radiant after every use. Gentle cleansing agents cleanse without causing dryness or irritation.

With regular use, your skin feels smoother, looks brighter, and appears more even-toned.

👩🦰 Suitable For:

All skin types, including sensitive body skin.

🕒 How to Use:

Apply to wet body skin and massage gently in circular motions. Rinse thoroughly. Use 2–3 times a week for best results.

Full Product Description

Guerniss Raw Salicylic Acid Serum is a targeted skincare solution designed to combat acne, unclog pores, and improve overall skin clarity. This lightweight, fast-absorbing formula penetrates deep into pores to remove excess oil, dead skin cells, and impurities that cause breakouts.

Niacinamide works to reduce redness, minimize pores, and balance oil production, while Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Extract and Panthenol soothe and calm irritated skin. Glycerin and Propylene Glycol provide essential hydration without clogging pores, keeping skin balanced and comfortable.

With its non-greasy texture, this serum absorbs easily and layers well under moisturizer and sunscreen, making it suitable for daily use.
